topic: I remembered a babysitter we had when I was seven that no one else in my family remembers
title: I Remember a Babysitter We Had When I Was Seven. No One Else in My Family Remembers Her. | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: I had a babysitter when I was seven. Nobody in my family remembers her.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an old framed family photograph on a hallway wall showing a family group portrait, an empty space in the corner of the photo where another figure might have stood, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Her name was Cassidy. Tall. Long brown hair. Came on Tuesdays.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an empty wooden front porch chair on a residential porch at evening, an empty coffee cup on the side table, no person visible, soft warm porch light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She watched me. My brother. My sister. For one whole school year.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a 1990s suburban living room at evening, a TV playing static in the corner, three small bowls of cereal on a coffee table, no people in the room, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I asked my mother about her last Thanksgiving.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a family dinner table set for a holiday meal, a turkey in the center, several place settings, no people seated yet, soft pendant light overhead, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: She had no idea what I was talking about.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of two coffee cups on a kitchen counter at morning, one half full and one empty, soft window light through curtains, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I asked my brother. He was older. He should remember.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen showing a text message conversation thread with the most recent message visible asking a question, the screen glow dim, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: He had no memory of any babysitter.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone showing a text reply that simply reads no, the screen dim, the rest of the device in shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I dug out my second grade journal from my parents' basement.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open spiral-bound elementary school notebook on a basement workbench, childhood handwriting visible on the page, dim hanging bulb light, the rest of the basement in shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Forty entries mention Cassidy. By name.
scenes.image_prompt: extreme close up of a child's handwritten journal entry on lined notebook paper, a name written multiple times in the same blue pen, ink slightly faded with age, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I called my elementary school. Records of after school care.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand holding a smartphone with a call screen visible to a school office number, dim ambient room light, the surrounding desk in soft focus, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: School had no employee or contractor by that name. Ever.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an open manila folder on a desk with photocopied employment records visible, a hand running down a list of names, no name highlighted, fluorescent overhead light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I asked my sister last week. She started crying. She remembers her too.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of two empty coffee cups left on a small kitchen table at evening, two chairs pushed back as if recently vacated, dim pendant light overhead, vertical 9:16 framing
